backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the Jeevan HealthCare backend, defining data types (UserProfile, Booking, Service, etc.), state maps, and shared functions for user management, bookings, Stripe payments, access control, and blob storage.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting three implemented features related to removing the standalone /symptom-checker route, keeping it embedded in the Health tab, and cleaning up orphaned navigation references.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of all frontend source files, describing the purpose and key details of each component, page, hook, and config file in the project.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens (background, foreground, primary, sidebar, chart colors, etc.) using OKLCH values.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Jeevan HealthCare React app, mounting the app into a root div and loading the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Defines the TanStack Router flat route tree with all public, admin, phlebotomist, and doctor routes (no /symptom-checker route), wrapped in QueryClient and ThemeProvider providers.
frontend/src/components/admin/AdminLayou: Protected sidebar layout for admin/lab-executive users that redirects unauthorized users to home and renders an admin navigation menu with an Outlet.
frontend/src/components/doctor/DoctorLay: Protected sidebar layout for doctor-role users that shows an access-denied card for non-doctors and renders a doctor-specific navigation menu with an Outlet.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Footer component displaying the Jeevan HealthCare logo, quick links, service links, contact details, social media icons, and a caffeine.ai attribution line.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky site header with navigation links, Internet Identity login/logout, cart badge, and a user dropdown menu that routes to role-based dashboards.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Root layout component that wraps all pages with Header, Footer, and a ProfileSetupModal that appears when an authenticated user has no profile.
frontend/src/components/phlebotomist/Phl: Protected sidebar layout for phlebotomist-role users that redirects unauthorized users and renders a minimal navigation menu with an Outlet.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Modal dialog with a react-hook-form form that collects name, email, and phone to create a new patient UserProfile on first login.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor, invalidating dependent queries whenever the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useCart.ts: Zustand store with localStorage persistence managing cart items (add, remove, clear) and computing total price, MRP, and savings.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication on the ICP platform, managing login/logout state, identity persistence, and AuthClient creation with configurable options.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks (queries and mutations) for interacting with the backend actor, covering services, user profiles, admin checks, role checks, bookings, and other healthcare data operations.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind CSS, defines OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for the Jeevan brand color system in light and dark modes, and adds utility classes for brand colors.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider into the DOM root.
frontend/src/pages/AboutPage.tsx: Static About page displaying Jeevan HealthCare's mission, vision, story, and core values using card components and icons.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminCRMPage.ts: Admin CRM page for managing sales leads with status tracking, filtering, and a dialog for adding/editing lead details using local state.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminCustomersP: Admin page for managing customers with search, add/edit/delete operations via backend query hooks, and a detail dialog showing associated patients.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminDashboardP: Admin dashboard displaying key operational metrics (orders, users, phlebotomists, reports) fetched via the useDashboardStats hook as stat cards.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminOrdersPage: Admin page that fetches and displays all customer bookings/orders in cards, showing address, description, preferred date, budget, and urgency badge. Handles loading and error states.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminPatientsPa: Admin page for full CRUD management of patients, with search filtering, add/edit/delete dialogs, vitals lookup per patient, and navigation to patient details.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminReportsPag: Admin page displaying a static mock list of test reports with verified/pending status badges and buttons to view or verify each report.
Admin page that fetches and displays all diagnostic services/packages in a grid of cards, showing name, category, subcategory, and active/inactive status.
Admin page that fetches and displays all system users in cards, showing name, email, role (with icon), and active status using role-specific labels and icons.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminVitalsPage: Admin page for full CRUD management of patient vitals, with search and status filtering, an add dialog, and status icons/badges indicating normal, moderate, or critical readings.
frontend/src/pages/BookingPage.tsx: Multi-step booking form page that collects patient details, address, time slot, and payment method, then simulates booking submission and clears the cart on success.
frontend/src/pages/CartPage.tsx: Displays the shopping cart with items (tests/packages), showing prices, MRP, savings, and options to remove items or clear the cart. Includes an order summary sidebar with total calculations and a checkout button.
frontend/src/pages/ContactPage.tsx: Renders the Contact Us page with contact details (phone, WhatsApp, email, address, hours) displayed as cards, plus social media links and an embedded Google Map.
frontend/src/pages/doctor/DoctorAnalytic: Displays doctor performance analytics including completed consultations, average rating, total patients, and success rate using stats fetched via useDoctorDashboardStats hook.
frontend/src/pages/doctor/DoctorAppointm: Manages doctor appointments with day/week/month view toggles and allows accepting, cancelling, or completing appointments via the useUpdateDoctorAppointment mutation.
frontend/src/pages/doctor/DoctorConsulta: Provides a teleconsultation interface with video/audio/chat controls and a tabbed SOAP notes form for documenting patient consultations and prescriptions.
frontend/src/pages/doctor/DoctorDashboar: Doctor dashboard home page showing a personalized welcome and quick stats (today's appointments, pending prescriptions, earnings, rating) fetched from useDoctorDashboardStats.
frontend/src/pages/doctor/DoctorEarnings: Displays doctor earnings summary (total, pending payments, current month) with an export button and tabbed earnings details, using data from the useDoctorEarnings hook.
frontend/src/pages/doctor/DoctorHelpPage: Renders the doctor Help & Support page with quick-link cards for training, compliance, and support tickets, an FAQ accordion, and a contact/support ticket form.
frontend/src/pages/doctor/DoctorPatients: Displays a searchable list of the doctor's patients fetched via the useDoctorPatients hook, showing each patient's demographics, blood group, and relationship with loading/error states.
frontend/src/pages/doctor/DoctorProfileP: Provides a tabbed profile settings page for doctors covering personal information, qualifications/certifications, availability scheduling, and notification/security settings.
frontend/src/pages/HealthPage.tsx: Interactive health tools page featuring a symptom checker (with rule-based analysis and severity output) and a vitals tracker tab, built with tabbed navigation and progress indicators.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Landing page displaying quick service shortcuts, a toggleable health packages section fetched from the API, a 'Why Choose Us' section, and a hero with a booking CTA.
frontend/src/pages/OrdersPage.tsx: Lists mock lab test orders with status badges, filterable by All/Active/Completed tabs, and provides navigation to individual order tracking pages.
frontend/src/pages/OrderTrackingPage.tsx: Shows a static order tracking timeline for a given order ID, rendering each step (booking confirmed through report ready) with completed/pending visual indicators.
frontend/src/pages/phlebotomist/Phleboto: Lists the phlebotomist's assigned sample collections for the day, showing patient name, address, scheduled time, test badges, status, and a Google Maps navigation button.
Shows a phlebotomist dashboard with four metric cards (total, completed, in-progress, and pending collections) derived from the useSampleCollections hook.
frontend/src/pages/ReportsPage.tsx: Displays a list of mock verified lab test reports with order details, test badges, and a Download PDF button for each report.
frontend/src/pages/ServicePage.tsx: Renders a dynamic service detail page based on URL params, showing service description, included services, target audience, and benefits using static service data.
frontend/src/pages/TestsPage.tsx: Provides a searchable, filterable catalog of diagnostic lab tests with cart functionality, prescription upload, and profile setup modal integration.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides utility functions for reading URL query parameters from both standard and hash-based routes, persisting them to sessionStorage, and cleaning sensitive parameters from the URL hash.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the frontend, extending the default theme with custom colors (using oklch CSS variables), border radii, shadows, fonts, keyframes, and plugins (typography, container-queries, animate).
project_state.json: Tracks the overall project state (version 7) for the Jeevan HealthCare app, documenting the tech stack, architectural notes, existing implemented features, and known issues for build planning.
